creator: hardy.schumacher@amd.com
text:
"Return to Castle Wolfenstein" ist started with "wolfsp". 
It starts, intro is seen, menu worlks too. But when starting a new game, loading screen appears for a short time and then the game shuts down.

Here is the complete log from console:
